feed.title: SAP Community - SAP NetWeaver
feed.subtitle: SAP NetWeaver Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP NetWeaver 7.5 Installation issue with SAP Instance failing to start.
entry.content:
I am getting this error on SAP NetWeaver 7.5 installation.

I am running on an Oracle 7.9 system with Oracle 19c pre-installed and using the $ORACLE_HOME as the one provided by Oracle.

I followed this info on using the ORACLE_HOME path and data files location with custom database option.

What can be causing a SAP instance to fail to startup and what logs do you log for to see what command is used?

Thx.

entry.title: Role Request getting auto reconcile
entry.content:
Hi IDM Gurus,

There is an issue, a user had requested a role last year it got approved but Status was failed, Operation Text was "Not Assigned".
The role request got auto reconciled again same approval flow happened but still not assigned.
Even after approving, the role is not getting assigned and getting reconciled again and again.

Could you please provide assistance to find out the cause of this issue.
Your prompt guidance is highly appreciated.

Thanks & Regards,
Laxmi

entry.title: Active/passive Oracle Database in a Red Hat High Availability Pacemaker Cluster
entry.content:
Dear Support,

in our recently installed SAP Process Orchestration (distributed systems) we want to configure High Availability for instance Oracle Database.

These are the details:

OS: RHEL 8.8 with licenses RHEL for SAP solution

DB: Oracle 19c

SAP Process Orchestration 7.5 SP28 

In particular we want to implement Oracle Database in a Red Hat High Availability Pacemaker Cluster.

Please give your confirmation that we can follow the solution provided by RHEL: Otherwise please provide SAP official KB in order to implement the solution required.

Best regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP NetWeaver 7.5 SP15 on SAP ASE linux credentials on AWS
entry.content:
SAP NetWeaver 7.5 SP15 on SAP ASE Linux and SAP credentials on AWS. I am unable to login after deployment.

sid-j2e Login:

entry.title: SAP Extended Maintenance
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

My current system version is SAP ERP 6.0 with SAP EHP2 for SAP NetWeaver 7.0. I also have an additional add-on, SAP Access Control 10.1, which has had no support since the end of 2020.

SAP has extended the maintenance for the SAP EHP2 until the end of 2025 (Abab). Do we have the same situation for this add-on?

Thanks in advance,

entry.title: Is any way to disable SQL Server transaction log while importing the TR
entry.content:
As we are trying to import the TR into the system my SQL Server transaction log get full and my system get down
so kindly suggest is any way we are disable my sql log while importing the TR.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Use of Oracle Standby database (Setup using datagurard) for System Refresh
entry.content:
We have a query on system refresh. SAP Production system is PR4 and test system is FU4. SAP version is NW 740 ERP 6. Kernel release is 753. DB release is IP_ADDRESS.

Currently SAP PR4 and FU4 database is hosted in Exadata machine RAC cluster with two active nodes. SAP PR4 has a standby database and replication is happening using Oracle Dataguard. 

DBA can clone and rename the PR4 standby database to FU4 database which then can be used for refresh of the SAP FU4? Because no restore is involved and coning can be done very quickly, this will save about 30 hrs of DB restore time. Please advise if this approach is supported by SAP. 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP Portal upgrade from current version SAP NW 7.50, SPS 20 to SAP NW 7.50, SPS 26
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Hope you are doing good !!

We are planing to upgrade the EP portal systems from current version SAP NW 7.50, SPS 20 to SAP NW 7.50, SPS 26 and This will be a Technical SPS Upgrade only.

Kindly help on what is the required activities from portal end (pre and post upgrade).

Thank you so much in advacne !!

Regards,
Prasad

entry.title: SAP GRC NFE NT 2024 001 (CTe 4.00)
entry.content: Poderia nos ajudar a entender quando será lançado alguma SAP Note referente a NT 2024 001 (CTe 4.00)

entry.title: Previous data showing in SAP ui5 screen
entry.content:
1. open a first page with navigation list of 2 line items
  2. Navigate to 2nd page using first line item
  3. Go back and opne 2nd line item
  4. busy dialog open along with first line item's data

when we open second line item, previous data is showing along with busy dialong.

Please help how to clear previous data while current page busy dialouge shows.

entry.title: Link for download media 51055918 for SQL server 2022
entry.content:
We are looking for media 51055918 for SQL server 2022

SQL Server RDBMS medium (for runtime customers)

entry.title: Declustering
entry.content:
Hello, I have a question about the declustering of the payroll and time data. I have found quite a few bits of information that are stated as fact, but are confusing and in the case of some of them, seem to be contradictory:

Declustering is mandatory and automatically performed when the Hana database is used.
Declustering is mandatory and automatically performed when you run Netweaver 7.5 or above.
There is a switch that activates declustering in the SAP system.
When declustering is active, payroll results are still written to the cluster tables and transferred to the declustered tables as part of the payroll process.

In my case, we're running on NetWeaver 7.5 with the Hana database, but when I check some of the declustered tables, such as p2rx_rt, they exist, but appear to be empty. How does declustering work? Does it have to be activated manually? If so, why is it said to be mandatory for NetWeaver 7.5 and/or Hana? The only thing that appears to have happened in my case, is that the declustered tables were created, which doesn't seem like much of a difference.

entry.title: DBA Cockpit Webdynpro not displaying graphical explain
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I am currently trying to analyse expensive sql statements in the DBACOCKPIT but when trying to use the Webdynpro DBACOCKPIT Explain, the screen stays empty:

I activated all SICF Nodes in according to this node:

1245200 - DBA: ICF Service Activation for WebDynpro DBA Cockpit 

I also regenerated the views via the transaction SGEN. Ran all the connection test without any issues.

I checked ST22 and SU53 but see no dumps or authorization errors.

In another thread it was mention that the hostname could be an issue but this is working fine. The only thing I saw was that I receive an error in the web browser console for a dependency not being found, but checking SICF I couldn't find any missing nodes.

Does anyone has a clue or did I miss anything for the configuration?

Thanks for your effort and time.

BR,

Andreas

entry.title: SQL5137N error during System Rename
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

We are using DB2 on windows and doing System Rename. At the end of the stage we receive the error

I look at sapinst_dev and managed to get the root cause:

update dbm cfg using DIAGPATH \\ATSUGA\db2dumpBWD
SQL5137N The entry in the database manager configuration file for the
diagnostic directory path (diagpath) is invalid.

Please suggest to me how to resolve this error

Thank you

ZULFADZLY IQBAL

entry.title: IDoc DEBMAS07 - how to update KNVV-LIFSD (delivery block) with blank value
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm able to update KNVV-LIFSD of customer accounts with valid values, for example XX in IDoc DEBMAS under segment E1KNA1M/E1KNVVM.

Then I want to clear the delivery block for some accounts. So what I do is I populate the field LIFSD as blank under E1KNA1M/E1KNVVM. However, it gives me the error "Field KNVV-LIFSD . is not an input field"

Does anyone know how to clear KNVV-LIFSD with IDoc?

Regards,

Minh

entry.title: Homologar o CTe 4.0 junto a SEF-MG.
entry.content:
Estamos homologando o CTE 4.0 junto a SEF MG e estamos recebendo o erro 599 ao emitir um CTe, apesar do xml passar nos validadores. 

O erro é semelhante ao reportado em 12802345  mas como ainda não temos o CTe 4.0 em produção estou passando por isso apenas no ambiente de homologação.  Alguém está usando o ambiente de homologação da SEF-MG para emissão de CTe poderia me confirmar se passa pelo mesmo problema?

Utilizamos o SLL-NFE, release 900 SP 0035

entry.title: Oracle linux/OS upgrade
entry.content:
Hello team,

ALL our sap systems are on AWS with oracle database and oracle linux 7.x. since support is getting expired this year end, we would like to have some recommendations from you; 

  1. what is the best/recommended approach for upgrade --> in-place or out-of-place/fresh install
  2. Any SAP notes/documentation referring to oracle linux upgrade?
  3. Do you recommend any technical procedure for the same. 

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Verification of information about users.
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We need to extract information about whether users were created, changed or deleted in the databases of SAP environments.
How is it possible to extract this information from the database?

Best regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: ASCS pse certificates expiration monitoring
entry.content:
Good day,
We use standard system monitoring via SM7.2.
We have some problems with monitoring SSL certificates expiration in our NW systems.
Monitoring works fine for ABAP application instance (STRUST), but it is not monitoring ASCS (message server) pse certificates expiration.
Our ASCS (Message server) instance on the separate server, so it has own SSL certificates (server, client). Monitoring does not see it.
Could you help us to set up monitoring for ASCS pse certificates? 
I investigated other templates, but didn't find any appropriate.

PS: In most cases ASCS uses DI certificates via symlink, but in our situation it is not possible (cluster landscape, DI separate server).
PPS: ASCS does not have WD.

entry.title: Verwendung des BRTOOLS für Shrinken einer LOB Tabelle vor der Reorg.
entry.content:
Für die Reorganisierung der Tabelle muss vorerst die verknüpfte LOB Tabelle über einen SHRINK Befehl verkleinert werden.

Im normalen DBA Umfeld wäre es dieses Kommando:

ALTER TABLE <table> MODIFY LOB(DATEN) (SHRINK SPACE);

 

Bei SAP Datenbanken soll das BRTOOLS verwendet werden. Die Frage ist, wie das richtig Vorgehen ist, um die LOB Tabelle zu shrinken?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
